description_short: Momentum Mind Academy sells coaching programs and courses, including a 12-week Founder Mindset Masterclass, rather than a software product.
description_long:
Momentum Mind Academy is a coaching and courses business. Its flagship 12-week Founder Mindset Masterclass costs $1,997 and is sold alongside one-on-one coaching and a daily planner product.

The company sells knowledge programs and content rather than software; the site claims over 3,000 students.
not_startup_reason: Coaching / courses business, not a software startup.
